title: scorzoneroides nevadensis
intro: Scorzoneroides nevadensis, also known as Nevada snake-root or yellow star, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family, native to the southwestern United States. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Scorzoneroides nevadensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues.
